title: WenXin's Marioverse
description: This mod adds blocks, items, mobs, power ups, and more from the Marioverse!
body:
![Marioverse Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5efb1dd36a9511f076239627505e6b65df36b0f.png) ![RocketNode Server Hosting - Code: WARP-PIPES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c681a156a0f96cac67d4a19e6161fd09610df84.png)
Link: https://rocketnode.com/wenxin
Code: **WARP-PIPES 25% Off** ____ # 📗 Description 📗 This mod adds blocks, items, mobs, power ups, and more from the Marioverse!  🔹**Warp Pipes** for teleportation 🔹**Question Blocks** to loot for treasure 🔹**Power Ups** for new abilities 🔹**Customes** to disguise as your favorite character 🔹**Goombas** and other enemies to defeat 🔹**Damage** can shrink the player --- ## 🔥 Power Ups ❄️ 🔹**Super Mushroom** - Heals & grows the player 🔹**Dash Mushroom** - Boosts players & vehicles 🔹**1-Up Mushroom** - Gives a second chance like a totem 🔹**Fire Flower** - Shoot fireballs to set mobs on fire 🔹**Ice Flower** - Shoot ice balls to freeze mobs 🔹**Super Star** - Invincibility & instakill for a short time --- ## 🧢 Costumes 👕 🔹**Crafted** using a costume smithing template 🔹**Equip** in the Accessories slots for costumes 🔹Armor can be worn **over** costumes! 🔹Costumes **morph** depending on the power up used! 🔹**Dress up** as Mario, Luigi, or Princess Peach! --- ## 🗡️ Enemies 🛡️ 🔹**Goombas** - Stomp 'em! 🔹**Koopa Troopas** - Stomp 'em to get a shell to use as a weapon! 🔹**Piranha Plants** - Killing them drops a Piranha Plant Pod, plant it to use as defense! --- ## 🟩 Blocks 🟫 🔹**Question Blocks** - Store treasures, power ups, or enemies! 🔹**Invisible Question Blocks** - Question Blocks, but _i n v i s i b l e_ 🔹**Storage Bricks** - Hide your goodies (or a TNT trap) in a brick 🔹**Smashable Bricks** - Jump into it to destroy it 🔹**Checkpoint Flags** - Set your respawn point easily, but respawn at half-height! 🔹**Warp Pipes** - Link together with a wrench to teleport 🔹**Doors** - Link any door together with a wrench to teleport when opened! **(Needs 2 ender pearls each)** 🔹**Trapdoors** - Link any trapdoor together with a wrench to teleport when opened! **(Needs 2 ender pearls each)** 🔹**Paintings** - Link together with a wrench to teleport **(Needs 4 ender pearls each)** 🔹And **more!** --- ## 📝 Credits 📝 🔹**WenXin2** (Me) - Programmer, texture & model artist 🔹**Steeles** - Finding sounds 🔹**Lighter .F** - Help with the logo ___ ### Want only warp pipes? Then check out [Warp Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wenxins-warp-pipes)!
___ ### Disclaimer **This project is not associated with Nintendo in any way.** --- I've partnered with RocketNode Hosting! RocketNode provides top-tier server hosting worldwide, allowing you to set up your server with just a few clicks! Their intuitive dashboard makes server management a breeze, and you can even schedule automatic restarts without needing any coding knowledge. Use the code WARP-PIPES to get 25% off your first month on any of their gaming servers. Get started here: https://rocketnode.com/wenxin
